sections.sectionTitle: Topa in A Citaklo A Mite A Itna

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin na Israel mipihte, “Pasian' mi,” ci in la, “ Topa in a hehpih mite,” zong ci in
Tate aw, na nu uh zolbawl un. Amah ka zi hi nawnlo a, kei zong ama pasal ka hih nawnloh hangin a paktatna leh midang tawh a mawhnate a khawlna dingin zol un

A gamtat hoihlohna a khawl kei leh, a nu sung pan a suah laitakin a guaktangin a ommah bangin, a puanteng hawkkhiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak ding a, a keu, bangmah a po zawhlohna gamlak bangin ka bawl ding a, dangtakin a si ding hi
Ama tate, paktatna panin a piang tate ahih manin, tua a tate zong ka hehpih kei ding hi

A nu uh a paktat hi a, tua ahih manin amaute a paai numei, zumna mel theiloin a gamta ahi hi. Amah in, “Ka it pasal dangte kiangah ka pai ding hi. Amaute in an leh tui, samul puan leh saihadial puan, oliv thau leh zu hong pia uh hi,” a cizaw lai hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah a paikhiat zawhlohna dingin ling ka kaihnelh ding a, a kimkotah kulh ka ciang ding hi

Amah in a pasal dangte delh ding a, ahi zongin amaute kiang tung zolo ding hi. Amah in amaute zong niloh ding a, ahi zongin mu zolo ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka pasal masa kiangah ciahkik ning; tu-a bangin ka om sangin ama kiang nuamzaw ding hi,” a ci ding hi
Ama tungah an, leenggahzu, leh oliv thau ka piakna, leh Baal pasian biakna dingin a zat ngun leh kham tampi tak a piapa ka hihlam hong phawkkhalo hi
Tua ahih manin anlak hun ciangin ama tungah ka piak ngei an leh leenggahzute ka pia nawn kei ding a, a silh dingin ka piak samul puan leh saihadial puante ka pia nawn kei ding hi
Tua ciangin ama it pasal dangte' muhna-ah a puante hawkkhiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak ding a, kuamah in kei' khutsung panin honkhia zolo ding hi
Ama lungdam theihna, a kumsim pawite, a khasim pawite, a nipisim pawite, a biakna kikhop khempeuh ka beisak ding hi
Ka pasal it dangte in thamanin hong piak hi, ci-in a gen a leengguite leh a theikungte ka susia ding a, gamsate in tuate suksiatsakin gamlakpi a suak ding hi

Kei hong mangngilh tanvei sung, Baal pasian tungah paknamtui a hal tanvei sung, leh a pasal it dangte tawh a kikhawl dingin a manpha kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a kizep hun tanvei sungzah mah gim ka pia ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin sehnel gamah amah ka paipihkik ding a, itna kam tawh hopihin ka zolkik ding hi

Tua lai panin a leenggui lote ka piakik ding a, Lungkhamna Kuam a cihnopna Akhor Kuam pen lametna kongpi ka suaksak ding hi. Egypt panin a paikhiat, a nungakno hun lai mah bangin ka thugennate hong ngai ding hi
Tua ciangin kei pen, ka pasal, hong ci kik ding a, kei pen, ka Baal pasian, hong ci nawnlo ding hi
Ama kam panin Baal pasian min ka pulaksak nawn kei ding a, a min kilokha nawnlo ding hi

Tua ciangin, ka mite a suksiatlohna dingun gamlaka om gamsate, huih laka leeng vasate, leh leitungah a bokvak ganhingte tawh thuciamna ka bawl ding a, thalte, namsaute, galhiam khempeuh, leitung panin ka phiatkhia ding hi. A lungmuang hithiatin ka mite ka omsak ding hi
Israel aw, nang, zi-in kong neikik ding a, nang tungah thuman thutangin kong gamta kik ding hi. Nang hong itin kong hehpih tawntung ding a, keima-a' na hi tawntung ding hi
Kei-a' ahi tawntung dingin nang kong la ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak nong thei ding hi
Tua ni ciangin keima mi Jezreel-te' thungetna ka pia ding a, leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi
Leitung in an, leenggahzu leh sathaute piangsak ding hi

Leitungah ka mite kipsakin a cithei-in ka bawl ding a, hehpih loh, a kici mite ka hehpih ding a, ka mi hilo, a kici mite, ka mi na hi uh hi, ka ci ding a, amaute in, “Nang pen kote' Pasian na hi hi,” hong ci ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi.
